verdict.answer_first: A's 'Short answer: the deploy environment isn't resolving the module the same way your machine does — almost always because of one of these four' immediately frames the problem and solution space.
verdict.decisiveness: A provides a more decisive diagnostic path: 'If it's a third-party package → cause #1 (grep your manifest/lockfile for it). - If it's a relative path (`./...`) → cause #2 or #3 (check casing and your build config)'.
verdict.actionability: A's diagnostic flowchart is the fastest thing to act on. I can look at the error message I already have and immediately know where to focus, which is faster than B's (also good) suggestion to do a full clean install.
